# Python 3.12, same interpreter as src/platform/carla/ (shared df_ctypes.py).
# Deliberately NO carla entry here - that absence is the entire point of
# this binding (docs/df_carla_mcap_replay_plan.md): replay reads a
# previously recorded .mcap and never touches a CARLA server.

pyyaml>=6.0

# Generated by interfaces' Conan package via protoc 3.21.12; >=4.25 (not an
# exact pin) because mcap-protobuf-support forces that floor - verified
# compatible, see src/platform/carla/requirements.txt's comment.
protobuf>=4.25

mcap>=1.0
mcap-protobuf-support>=0.5

# --viz only (docs/df_carla_viz_plan.md): self-contained 2D bird's-eye-view
# window - no external app, no server/connection lifecycle.
opencv-python>=4.9
numpy>=1.26

# --viz only: live Foxglove Studio stream of df/aeb_outputs + chase video
# (separate from the BEV window above - no 3D scene here, so none of the
# frame-tree issues that hit the earlier, dropped SceneUpdate design apply).
foxglove-sdk>=0.25
